Layout.title: ThinkNote - Personal Knowledge Base
Layout.description: A modern, beautiful hub for your programming knowledge, notes, and insights.

footer.copyright: © {year} ThinkNote. Built with ❤️ for knowledge sharing.

hero.title: Welcome to Your
hero.subtitle: Knowledge Universe
hero.description: A beautifully crafted space where your programming insights, code snippets, and technical wisdom come to life.

featuredCategories.title: Popular Categories
featuredCategories.description: Explore the most valuable programming concepts, best practices, and technical deep-dives organized by category.

programmingLanguages.title: Programming Languages
programmingLanguages.description: Master Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python and more with comprehensive tutorials and best practices.

developmentCore.title: Development Core
developmentCore.description: Learn software architecture, design patterns, and core development principles that every developer should know.

toolsAI.title: Tools & AI
toolsAI.description: Discover productivity tools, IDEs, AI technologies, and automation that enhance your development workflow.

cta.title: Ready to explore the knowledge?
cta.description: Join me on this continuous learning journey. Every article is crafted with care to help you grow as a developer.

TopicsPage.title: Explore All Topics
TopicsPage.description: Dive deep into programming concepts, best practices, and the latest insights from my continuous learning journey. Each article is crafted to provide practical value and actionable knowledge.

noTopics.title: No Topics Found
noTopics.description: It seems there are no knowledge articles available at the moment. Check back soon for new content!

cta.title: Can't find what you're looking for?
cta.description: This knowledge base is constantly growing. If you have suggestions for topics you'd like to see covered, feel free to reach out!

CategoriesPage.title: Browse by Categories
CategoriesPage.description: Explore articles organized by specific domains and technologies. Each category contains curated content to help you master different aspects of development.

noCategories.title: No Categories Found
noCategories.description: No categories are available yet. Articles need to have categories defined.

card.articlesAvailable: {count, plural, one {# article} other {# articles}} available

cta.title: Want to explore more?
cta.description: Browse all articles or search for specific topics that interest you most.

TagsPage.title: All Tags
TagsPage.description: Discover content organized by topics and technologies. Each tag represents a collection of carefully curated articles and insights.

noTags.title: No Tags Found
noTags.description: There are no tags available at the moment. Check back when articles are added!

cta.title: Ready to dive into the topics?
cta.description: Start exploring articles by clicking on any tag above, or browse organized categories to discover comprehensive programming insights and tutorials.

header.title: {tag} Articles
header.description: Explore {count} carefully curated article{count, plural, one {} other {s}} focused on {tag}. Each piece is designed to provide practical insights and actionable knowledge.

relatedTags.title: Related Tags
